Design prior as a length-3 genotype-frequency vector

Source: R/presets_design.R
design_prior.Rd

Thin accessor over design_priors() that returns the single-locus genotype frequencies as the c(f_REF, f_HET, f_ALT) vector consumed directly by call_gt() as its prior. Keeps the design prior derived, never typed.

Usage

design_prior(design)

Arguments

design

Design key (e.g. "BC2S2", "BC2S3"), as for design_priors().

Value

Named numeric length-3 vector c(REF, HET, ALT) summing to 1.

See also

design_priors(), call_gt()

Examples

design_prior("BC2S3")                          # c(REF = .8594, HET = .0312, ALT = .1094)
#>    REF    HET    ALT 
#> 0.8594 0.0312 0.1094 
call_gt(0, 1, prior = design_prior("BC2S3"))   # design prior resists the het flip -> 2
#> [1] 2
